fields.label: Regular business operations
fields.definition: A business life event related to the economic affairs domain, covering services around: tax and corporate finance, VAT and business changes. A total of 10 services are assessed under this life event.

fields.label: Moving
fields.definition: A citizens life event related to the housing domain, covering services around: find, adapt and move to new house, and moving and living abroad. A total of 8 services are assessed under this life event.

fields.label: Transport
fields.definition: A citizen life event related to the transport domain, covering services around: buying a car, and taxes, certificates and permits. A total of 9 services are assessed under this life event.

fields.label: Starting a small claims procedure
fields.definition: A citizen life event related to the justice domain, covering services around: preparing claim, issuing claim and monitoring status and appeal. A total of 6 services are assessed under this life event.

fields.label: Business Start-up
fields.definition: A business life event related to the economic affairs domain, covering services around: orientation, administrative requirements, basic registration, tax-related matters, insurance-related matters, hiring a first employee and request an environmental permit. A total of 16 services are assessed under this life event.

fields.label: Family
fields.definition: A citizen life event related to the social protection domain, covering services around: birth, marriage, personal documents and registering death. A total of 10 services are assessed under this life event.

fields.label: Career
fields.definition: A citizen life event related to the employment domain, covering services around: immediate actions for unemployed, guidance on additional benefits and allowances, maintaining applicable benefits, finding a new job and fulfilling duties being employed and retiring. A total of 19 services are assessed under this life event.

fields.label: Studying
fields.definition: A citizen life event related to the educational domain, covering services around: orientation, enrolment and study guidance. A total of 11 services are assessed under this life event.

fields.label: Health
fields.definition: A citizen life event related to the health domain, covering services around: obtain a European Health Insurance Card, applying for electronic health records. A total of 7 services are assessed under this life event.

fields.label: Citizen life events
fields.definition: The citizen life events are: Moving, Owning and driving a car, Starting a small claims procedure, Family, Career and Studying

fields.label: Business life events
fields.definition: The business life events are: Regular business operations and Business Start-up

fields.label: All Life Events
fields.definition: Biennial average over 9 life events. Life events are packages of government services which are usually provided by multiple government agencies around a subject that occur in relation each other, from the perspective of the citizen or entrepreneur concerned. In other words, life events are chains of services that are logically coherent from the perspective of actual users. 5 life events being measured in odd years (e.g.2021, 2023) and 4 life events in even years (2020, 2022). Odd years life events consist of: Regular business operations; Transport; Starting a small claims procedure; Moving; and Health. Even years life events consists of: Business Start-up; Career; Studying and Family. * Health life event was introduced in 2021

fields.label: Individuals living in a household with income in first quartile (lowest)
fields.definition: Income in the first quartile means income among the 25% lowest income observed

fields.label: Individuals living in a household with income in second quartile
fields.definition: Income in the second quartile means income among the 50% lowest incomes observed, but not among the 25% lowest

fields.label: Individuals living in a household with income in third quartile
fields.definition: Income in the third quartile means income among the 50% highest incomes observed, but not among the 25% highest

fields.label: Individuals living in a household with income in fourth quartile (highest)
fields.definition: Income in the fourth quartile means income among the 25% highest incomes observed

fields.label: Edge nodes deployment target per member state (indicative)
fields.definition:
High-level estimation on the distribution of edge nodes required per Member State to reach the 2030 European target (10.000 Edge nodes deployed across EU territory). 

It offers an indicative value for member states Edge deployment ambitions.

Transparency of service delivery
fields.definition: The extent to which the service process and expectations are clarified.

fields.label: Transparency of personal data
fields.definition: The extent to which user can manage their personal data held by government organisations.

fields.label: Transparency of service design
fields.definition: The extent to which user are informed on and involved in policy and service design processes.

fields.label: All citizen life events
fields.definition: There are 7 life events considered for citizens: 1. Family, 2. Career, 3. Studying, 4. Health, 5. Transport, 6. Moving, 7. Starting a Small Claims Procedure.

fields.label: All business life events
fields.definition: There are 2 life events considered for businesses: 1. Business Start-up, 2. Regular Business Operations.

fields.label: All life events
fields.definition: Life events are key moments in citizens’ lives that rely on services offered by different public sector bodies: moving, transport, starting a small claims procedure, family, career, studying, health, starting a business and conducting regular business operations.

fields.label: Regular business operations
fields.definition: A business life event related to the economic affairs domain, covering services around: tax and corporate finance, VAT and business changes

fields.label: Business start-up
fields.definition: A business life event related to the economic affairs domain, covering services around: orientation, administrative requirements, basic registration, tax-related matters, insurance-related matters, hiring a first employee and request an environmental permit

fields.label: Transport
fields.definition: A citizen life event related to the transport domain, covering services around: buying a car, and taxes, certificates, permits and public transport.

fields.label: Justice (Starting a small claims procedure)
fields.definition: A citizen life event related to the justice domain, covering services around: preparing claim, issuing claim and monitoring status and appeal.

fields.label: Health
fields.definition: A citizen life event related to obtaining basic healthcare services, covering services around: search relevant healthcare provider, e-consultations and medical records.

fields.label: Moving
fields.definition: A citizen life event related to the housing domain, covering services around: find, adapt and move to new house, and moving and living abroad.

fields.label: Family
fields.definition: A citizen life event related to the social protection domain, covering services around: birth, marriage, personal documents and registering death.

fields.label: Career
fields.definition: A citizen life event related to the employment domain, covering services around: immediate actions for unemployed, guidance on additional benefits and allowances, maintaining applicable benefits, finding a new job and fulfilling duties being employed and retiring.

fields.label: Studying
fields.definition: A citizen life event related to the educational domain, covering services around: orientation, enrolment and study guidance.
